business.about: Licensed painting contractors delivering clean, lasting results for interior and exterior projects. Free estimates, premium materials, and meticulous prep work.

services.name: Interior Painting
services.description: Walls, ceilings, trim, and doors. Includes prep, priming, and two coats of premium paint.

services.name: Exterior Painting
services.description: Full exterior including siding, trim, fascia, and shutters. Power wash prep and premium exterior paint.

services.name: Cabinet Refinishing
services.description: Sand, prime, and spray kitchen or bathroom cabinets. Factory-smooth finish at a fraction of replacement cost.

services.name: Color Consultation
services.description: In-home color consultation with our design specialist. We help you pick the perfect palette.

testimonials.name: Happy Customer
testimonials.text: Transformed our entire first floor. The prep work made all the difference.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Client
testimonials.text: Exterior looks brand new. Neighbors keep asking who we used.

testimonials.name: Repeat Customer
testimonials.text: Third project with them. Always clean, always on schedule, always great.

process.title: Free Estimate
process.description: We visit your property, measure, and provide a detailed quote — no obligation.

process.title: Pick Your Colors
process.description: Choose from our curated palettes or bring your own. We provide sample swatches.

process.title: Expert Results
process.description: Meticulous prep, premium paint, clean lines. Backed by our workmanship guarantee.

chatbot.greeting: Hi! Looking for a painting estimate? Tell me about your project and I'll get you started.
qualifyingQuestions: How many rooms or what's the square footage?
When are you looking to get this done?
